---
title: The efficacy of low emission zones in central London as a means of reducing nitrogen dioxide concentrations
date: '2002-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- S.D. Beevers
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Transportation Research Part D: Transport and Environment*'
---

## The efficacy of low emission zones in central London as a means of reducing nitrogen dioxide concentrations

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, S.D. Beevers</p>

_*Transportation Research Part D: Transport and Environment*_, 2002


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2002-d.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
